   - sequenceNumber: 1

     - trackID: 1
     - defaultBaseIsMoof: true
    [tfdt] size=20 version=1 flags=000000
     - baseMediaDecodeTime: 0

     - sampleCount: 94
     - DataOffset: 1653

     - defaultSampleInfoSize: 8

     - sampleCount: 1
